title: Gifts for People — Sept 2025–Feb 2026 rolling list
html:
TL;DR

  • A rolling gift-list modified Sep 15 2025 → Feb 8 2026. Documents Yahir's gifting attention across his core people:
    • Dad — candles, Game of Scruples.
    • Mom — portable car charger, behind-the-head headphones.
    • Emily — Camel Turkish Royals (cigarettes), scent box, Danish apron.
    • Emilio — Cam Skattebo jersey.
    • Valeria — (blank).
    • Emily (second slot) — protein powder, wired headphones.
    • For watch / movies: Amateur, Girlfriends, Showgirls, Mójalo. Drive.
    • Self: nose-breathe (mouth-tape), shoelace, "Nesoress", phone wallet.
    • Book pick for self: Life of Ernest Hemingway.

Key data

Emily appears twice with two distinct gift slates — confirms relationship intensity around late 2025 / early 2026.

Why it matters in the graph

  • Confirms emily as a sustained, intimate relationship through Sept 2025 → Feb 2026. The gift-attention to Emily is the positive evidence side that pairs with the misalignment audit in 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment (Mar 2026 — same window, opposite valence).
  • Hemingway as the self-gift book — adds to Yahir's reading-bench (alongside dale carnegie in 2023 08 29 thoughts and principle from dale carnegie and gabriel garcia marquez in 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log).
  • Cam Skattebo jersey for Emilio — niche specific NFL player (2025 rookie); evidence Yahir tracks both fantasy + brother's actual rooting interest.
  • Mójalo. Drive — Spanish-language film/song — possibly tracks to Yahir's Spanish learning practice.

Open questions

  • Why is Valeria's slot blank — open intent or reminder to fill in?
  • "Nesoress" — typo for what? Worth checking.
  • Did all of these gifts actually get given?
